22.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

22.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
22.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

22.gl: to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
22.kj: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.

22.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
22.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
22.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

23.gl: to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin
23.kj: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poo

23.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
23.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

23.gl: a female slave (as a member of the household)
23.dv: feminine from an unused root meaning to spread out (as a family; see H4940 (מִשְׁפָּחָה));

23.gl: to be master; hence, to marry
23.kj: have dominion (over), be husband, marry(-ried, [idiom] wife).
23.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1167 (בַּעַל)

24.gl: abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance)
24.kj: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est).

24.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
24.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
24.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

24.gl: to be wise (in mind, word or act)
24.kj: [idiom] exceeding, teach wisdom, be (make self, shew self) wise, deal (never so) wisely, make wiser.

25.gl: properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prospe
25.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

25.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
25.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
25.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

25.gl: harvest (as the crop), whether the product (grain or fruit) or the (dry) season

25.kj: fierce, [phrase] greedy, mighty, power, roughly, strong.

25.gl: an ant (probably from its almost bisected form)

26.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
26.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

26.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
26.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

26.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
powerful (specifically, a paw); by implication, numerous
26.dv: or עָצֻם; passive participle of H6105 (עָצַם);

26.gl: a craggy rock, literally or figuratively (a fortress)
26.dv: from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

26.gl: a species of rockrabbit (from its hiding), i.e. probably the hyrax

27.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
27.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

27.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
27.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
27.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

27.gl: properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks);  to shoot an arrow
27.kj: archer, [idiom] bands, cut off in the midst.
27.dv: a primitive root (compare H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from H2671 (חֵץ)

28.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),
28.kj: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase
28.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

28.gl: to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably
28.kj: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, [idiom] surely, surprise, take.

28.gl: a large public building, such as a palace or temple
28.dv: probably from H3201 (יָכֹל) (in the sense of capacity);

28.gl: a lizard (from the superstition of its noxiousness)
28.dv: probably from H8074 (שָׁמֵם) (in the sense of poisoning);

29.gl: to be (causative) make well, literally (sound, beautiful) or figuratively (happy, successful, right)
29.kj: be accepted, amend, use aright, benefit, be (make) better, seem best, make cheerful, be comely, [phrase] be content, diligent(-ly), dress, earnestly, find favour, give, be glad, do

29.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
29.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro
[phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ).
29.dv: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number;

30.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
30.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

30.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
30.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
30.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

30.kj: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.
30.dv: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);

30.gl: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)
30.dv: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);
from H3888 (לוּשׁ) in the sense of crushing;

31.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
31.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

31.gl: desire (and so probably in Proverbs 31:4); hence (by way of alternative) or, also if
31.kj: also, and, either, if, at the least, [idiom] nor, or, otherwise, then, whether.
31.dv: presumed to be the 'constructive' or genitival form of אַו ; short for H185 (אַוָּה);

31.gl: properly, tightly girt, i.e. probably a racer, or some fleet animal (as being slender in the waist)
properly, the waist or small of the back; only in plural the loins
31.dv: from an unused root meaning to be slender;

31.gl: a buck or he-goat (as given to butting)
31.dv: from an unused root meaning to butt;

32.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),

32.gl: to wilt; generally, to fall away, fail, faint; figuratively, to be foolish or (morally) wicked; causatively, to despise, disgrace
32.kj: disgrace, dishounour, lightly esteem, fade (away, -ing), fall (down, -ling, off), do foolishly, come to nought, [idiom] surely, make vile, wither.

32.gl: to plan, usually in a bad sense
32.kj: consider, devise, imagine, plot, purpose, think (evil).

33.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
33.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

33.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
33.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

33.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)

33.kj: [phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

33.dv: or (shortened) חֵמָה; from the same root as H2346 (חוֹמָה);
